data.title: Seven Shareholder Questions Tyler Proud Needs to Answer
data.description: The Sylogist Board advocates for shareholders to use the BLUE proxy and urges Tyler Proud to address seven important questions from shareholders.

data.title: NORTHEAST INDIANA BANCORP, INC. ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS
data.description: In Huntington, Indiana, on April 28, 2026, Northeast Indiana Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQB: NIDB), the holding company for First Federal Savings Bank, disclosed a first-quarter net income of $1,599,000 ($0.68 per diluted common share) for the period ending on March 31, 2026. This figure stands in comparison to the previous net income amount.

data.title: Topaz Labs announces its largest single release of AI models in company history with "Next-Gen" launch
data.description: In Dallas on April 28, 2026, Topaz Labs, a leading AI image and video enhancement firm, introduced a total of six new enhancement models designed to enhance images and videos. These models are divided into four image enhancement models and two video enhancement models, all catering to five distinct applications. Branded as "Next-Gen" models, these cutting-edge tools provide robust functionalities like sharpening, denoising, and upscaling for various media projects.
US SENATOR WARREN PENS LETTER TO FED'S BOWMAN POSING QUESTIONS TO BANKING REGULATORS ON TRUMP'S PROPOSED CREDIT CARD CAP.

data.title: CPKC increases dividend by 17.5 percent
data.description: On April 28, 2026, the Board of Directors at Canadian Pacific Kansas City Limited announced a quarterly dividend of $0.268 per share on its Common Shares (TSX: CP) (NYSE: CP) (CPKC). This marks a significant 17.5 percent increase from the previous dividend amount of $0.228 per share.

data.title: Z Squared, Inc. to Ring the Nasdaq Closing Bell in Celebration of Its Listing on the Nasdaq Global Market
data.description: Today, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Z Squared, Inc. (Nasdaq: ZSQR), a digital infrastructure company, revealed that its executive team, along with the board of directors, will ring the Nasdaq Closing bell.

data.title: Waldencast announces conclusion of SEC investigation
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Waldencast plc (NASDAQ: WALD), a global multi-brand beauty and wellness platform, announced the conclusion of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) investigation into the Company. The investigation was related to Waldencast’s restatement of financial results and internal control weaknesses linked to historical accounting practices used by Obagi Cosmeceuticals. The SEC staff notified Waldencast that they will not propose an enforcement action against the company based on the information available.

data.title: Most Americans Now Say U.S. Foreign Policy Ignores the Interests of Other Countries
data.description: A recent survey conducted by the Pew Research Center in 2026 reveals a significant shift in American public perception regarding the incorporation of other countries' interests in US foreign policy decisions. This survey, which has been conducted since 2002, shows that for the first time, there has been a noticeable change in opinion. The survey did not specify the exact numbers, but the change indicates a noteworthy development in how Americans view the consideration of other nations' interests in the decision-making process.

data.title: Pulse Seismic Inc. Reports Q1 2026 Financial Results and Increases Regular Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Pulse Seismic Inc., a company listed on the TSX under the ticker PSD and OTCQX as PLSDF, released its financial and operational report for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The unaudited condensed consolidated interim financial statements, along with associated notes and MD&A, are now accessible on SEDAR+ and can also be found on the company's official website. The report covers the company's performance over the specified three-month period.

data.title: SIG SAUER INTRODUCES NEW SIG CONNECT APP FEATURES
data.description: SIG SAUER, a top manufacturer of firearms, optics, and ammunition, has unveiled new features within its SIG CONNECT app. As of April 28, 2026, users can now generate challenges in their preferred games on the platform. This update allows for a more interactive experience for players, enhancing engagement levels.

data.title: Water Treatment Expert Jason McGee of Loretto Explains How Local Suppliers Improve Safety and Reliability for HelloNation
data.description: In Loretto, Tennessee on April 28, 2026, an article discusses the ways in which local suppliers can enhance the safety and reliability of modern water treatment systems. Water Treatment Expert Justin McGee from Southeastern Tank provides insightful perspectives on this topic. By collaborating with local suppliers, water treatment systems can be improved to ensure their effectiveness and dependability.

data.title: F5 to Host Analyst and Investor Meeting on May 28, 2026
data.description: F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV), a global leader in delivering and securing every app and API, will hold its Analyst and Investor Meeting on Thursday, May 28, 2026, at 1:00 pm ET in New York, NY. The event will be live webcast with replays available on the investor relations section of F5's website. F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) has been in operation for over 30 years and is known for its expertise in delivering and securing all types of applications.
CHILE'S CENTRAL BANK KEEPS ITS BENCHMARK INTEREST RATE UNCHANGED AT 4.50% IN A UNANIMOUS DECISION, WARNING THAT A PROLONGED MIDDLE EAST CONFLICT HEIGHTENS THE RISK OF SUSTAINED ELEVATED OIL PRICES.

data.title: Nektar to Announce Financial Results for the First Quarter on Thursday, May 7, 2026, After Close of U.S.-Based Financial Markets
data.description: In San Francisco on April 28, 2026, Nektar Therapeutics (Nasdaq: NKTR) revealed that its first-quarter financial results will be released on Thursday, May 7, 2026, post the closure of U.S. financial markets. Howard Robin, the President, and Chief Executive Officer will lead a conference in connection with this announcement.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Seagate, Bloom Energy, Teradyne Lead Earnings Movers After OpenAI Hits Techs; Titans On Tap
data.description: Stock prices experienced a decline due to concerns related to OpenAI and an increase in oil prices, although the market later recovered some of the losses. Companies in the artificial intelligence sector such as Seagate and Bloom Energy showed strong earnings growth. Dow Jones Futures saw Seagate, Bloom Energy, and Teradyne leading in earnings performance following the impact of OpenAI on the technology sector. Major players in the market are closely monitoring the developments.

data.title: HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding is Awarded Frigate Lead Yard Support Contract
data.description: In Pascagoula, Mississippi, on April 28, 2026, HII revealed that the U.S. Navy has granted its Ingalls Shipbuilding unit a substantial contract worth $283 million to conduct lead yard support operations for the FF(X) class frigate. This contract empowers Ingalls Shipbuilding to secure long lead time materials, initiate design tasks, and commence pre-construction activities for the inaugural ship in the new frigate series.
